calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate Judgment (Motions)
Off Calendar Jul-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JONATHAN VAKNIN, Esq. of SUTTELL & HAMMER, APC (Tel: 425-455-8220) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Judgment.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted. No opposition filed. Per plaintiff's request, the October 21, 2021 judgment is vacated and the case is dismissed without prejudice.

Prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order for review/signature.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
